summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LLP Phase 2 implementation. All 29 backend and frontend tests passed successfully. The platform now fully supports LLPs alongside Companies with entity-type-aware search/filter, LLP detail pages (Designated Partners, Total Contribution), Company-vs-LLP analytics breakdown, and entity-aware enrichment plumbing.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint (200)
Backend: Admin stats endpoint (200)
Backend: Enrichment progress endpoint (200)
Backend: Demo login (200)
Backend: Company detail by CIN resolves correctly (entity_type='Company')
Backend: LLP detail by LLPIN resolves correctly (entity_type='LLP', identifier_type='LLPIN', cin=null, total_contribution present)
Backend: LLP partners endpoint returns correct shape (llpin, count, partners:[])
Backend: Company directors endpoint (regression)
Backend: Filter by entity_type=LLP returns only LLPs
Backend: Filter by entity_type=Company returns only Companies
Backend: No entity_type filter returns both Companies and LLPs
Backend: Analytics summary includes by_entity_type breakdown (Company: 306,045, LLP: 93,203)
Backend: Analytics summary with city filter (Mumbai: 167,131 Companies + 60,389 LLPs)
Backend: Search includes entity_type in suggestions
Backend: Similar companies for Company (no crash)
Backend: Similar entities for LLP (no crash on null cin)
Backend: Company charges endpoint (regression)
Backend: Company filings endpoint (regression)
Backend: Company contact endpoint (regression)
Frontend: Demo login successful
Frontend: Search page entity-type filter with options (All types / Companies / LLPs)
Frontend: Filter by LLPs shows 93,203 LLPs with purple badges
Frontend: LLP detail page shows entity badge 'LLP', LLPIN identifier, Total contribution label, Designated Partners tab
Frontend: LLP overview shows LLPIN + Total contribution (NO Authorized/Paid-up capital)
Frontend: Company detail page shows entity badge 'COMPANY', Directors tab, CIN + Authorized + Paid-up capital
Frontend: Analytics page shows Company vs LLP breakdown (306,045 Companies 76.7%, 93,203 LLPs 23.3%) with split bar
Frontend: Dashboard loads without errors
Frontend: Export page loads without errors
Frontend: MCA Enrichment page loads without errors
